overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic elevated sidewalk at night. The scene features dense neon signage, holographic billboards, and a cyberpunk cityscape with moderate vehicle traffic and sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street corner with elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: character turns corner from plaza area onto main elevated walkway
entering covered section beneath arched transit structure

agents.ego_description: character in camouflage jacket and jeans walking along the sidewalk, turning the corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk
futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: distinctive orange metal grid walkway surface with geometric patterns
silver metal safety railing separating walkway from lower level
tall modern street lamp with bright white light
tall dark building with illuminated '05' sign near the top
vertical neon sign with 'NICOLA' text in white letters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city corner at night, with the character turning onto an elevated orange walkway. A tall building with a '05' sign dominates the background while neon signs begin to appear. The character passes a pedestrian and enters a covered section beneath an arched structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass with dense holographic advertising

events.description: passing beneath the first large arched support structure
large holographic billboard temporarily obscures view of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the covered corridor, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large curved metal and concrete transit structure with integrated lighting
large floating holographic advertisement displaying green-tinted imagery
linear neon light strips mounted to the underside of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered section of the elevated walkway, surrounded by dense holographic billboards and neon lighting. The arched transit structure creates a tunnel-like effect while vehicles pass by on the right. Various digital advertisements line the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection at end of covered walkway

events.description: walkway opens up toward illuminated intersection ahead
futuristic sports car passes quickly on the right side road

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the covered section where the walkway opens to a wider intersection area

notable_agents.action: street dweller sitting against the wall near the guardrail

entered.detail: opening at the end of the walkway revealing cross streets and traffic signals
illuminated traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The character nears the end of the covered walkway as the corridor opens toward a lit intersection. The arched structure recedes behind while traffic lights and crosswalks become visible ahead. A street dweller sits against the left wall as vehicles continue to pass on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic elevated walkway that transitions from an open city corner into a dense neon corridor before opening back up to a lit intersection. It begins as the character turns onto an orange path beneath a towering building marked with a 05 sign, passing a pedestrian while moving toward a covered section. As the character enters the arched transit structure, the environment shifts into a tunnel-like space saturated with holographic billboards and digital advertisements while vehicles stream past on the right. The scene then expands as the character nears the end of the covered walkway, with the arched structure receding to reveal a wide intersection complete with traffic lights and crosswalks. Finally, the camera passes a street dweller leaning against the left wall as the path opens fully into the glowing cityscape.
